refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions aligned with each phase allows targeted design and verification of each step, improving clarity and traceability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under defined duty cycle and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.

candidate_dps: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for load phase efficiency
Implement autonomous or assisted travel path planning and control
Enhance dump mechanism speed and reliability
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for load phase efficiency; Implement autonomous or assisted travel path planning and control; Enhance dump mechanism speed and reliability

potential_sources: Interdependence between travel and load phases timing
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically separable by cycle phase but require interface coordination to ensure smooth transitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle subsystems can be independently optimized without degrading overall cycle time
Risk of integration complexity if control coordination is insufficient
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions between phase DPs to manage coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for load, travel, and dump cycle phases

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle phase status and timing data to NGHE Solution for monitoring

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands and cycle targets from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Exchanges safety status and alerts with Safety Services module

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module fully contains physical and control aspects of cycle phases, minimal diffusion.
NGHE Solution oversees coordination but does not directly implement cycle phase controls.
Teleoperation influences tasking but does not contain cycle phase implementations.
Safety Services interacts via alerts but does not contain cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning cycle time optimization DPs to Vehicle module centralizes control and physical implementation, minimizing diffusion and improving ownership clarity.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in Vehicle module if all cycle phases tightly coupled
Risk of insufficient interface clarity with NGHE Solution and Safety Services
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider modular subcomponents within Vehicle for each cycle phase.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-functions; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists if Vehicle module becomes too complex managing all phases
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment scores; external interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times via Telemetry interface and validating against targets.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear ownership of cycle time functions assigned to Vehicle module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry clarity.
Consider sub-modularization within Vehicle for load, travel, and dump phases.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Vehicle module can be internally modularized to handle cycle phases
Interfaces with NGHE Solution and Safety Services are stable and well-defined
open_risks: Potential interface ambiguities with external modules
evidence_needed: Performance data validating cycle time improvements per phase
Interface specification documents confirming clarity and stability
